## Week in Review: 2026-05-11 to 2026-05-17

**One Nation** led search interest this week with an average score of 13.3.
The strongest combined search-and-sentiment score belonged to **One Nation**.

### Party Breakdown

- **Labor**: Avg interest 4.4 (+34.8% WoW), sentiment: neutral (-0.08)
- **Liberal**: Avg interest 2.9 (0.0% WoW), sentiment: neutral (+0.00)
- **Greens**: Avg interest 1.9 (+8.3% WoW), sentiment: neutral (+0.00)
- **One Nation**: Avg interest 13.3 (-28.5% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.16)
